EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriTerrainError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Terrain's error codes.

[Guid("421C3170-0D4B-4FA2-92A5-6982FA41F400")]
public enum esriTerrainError

Fields

E_TERRAIN_ANCHOR_POINTS_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147219392

-2147219392: Anchor-points data sources not supported in this release of the GeoDatabase.

E_TERRAIN_BAD_INPUT_FILE = -2147205047

-2147205047: The input file contains bad data.

E_TERRAIN_BAD_SHAPE_SIZE = -2147205106

-2147205106: The specified shape size is out of bound.

E_TERRAIN_BAD_WINDOWSIZE = -2147205066

-2147205066: The specified window size is either too small, or too big.

E_TERRAIN_BOUNDS_OVERLAP = -2147205097

-2147205097: Z tolerance bounds overlap with other data sources in the group, or with other Clip data sources.

E_TERRAIN_CANCELLED = -2147205116

-2147205116: Process is cancelled by the user.

E_TERRAIN_CANNOT_ADD_REGISTERED_CLASS_TO_TERRAIN = -2147205081

-2147205081: Cannot add a registered as versioned class to the terrain.

E_TERRAIN_CANNOT_BE_ANCHORED = -2147219393

-2147219393: Only point data sources can be anchored.

E_TERRAIN_CANNOT_CHANGE_SCHEMA = -2147205077

-2147205077: Changing the definition, or running a full rebuild, of a versioned Terrain is not allowed.

E_TERRAIN_CANNOT_PERFORM_SIMPLIFY_OVERVIEW = -2147205072

-2147205072: Cannot perform 'Simplify Overview' on an invalid, dirty, or versioned Terrain.

E_TERRAIN_CHANGE_CLASS_ID = -2147205089

-2147205089: The feature class ID of an embedded data source must not be changed.

E_TERRAIN_DATA_SOURCE_EXISTS = -2147205119

-2147205119: The input data source already exists.

E_TERRAIN_DATA_TYPE_MISMATCH = -2147219397

-2147219397: The input field data type does not match the one in the embedded data source.

E_TERRAIN_DIRTY_TERRAIN = -2147219396

-2147219396: The specified operation cannot be performed on dirty Terrains.

E_TERRAIN_EDIT_OPERATION_REQUIRED = -2147205070

-2147205070: The specified operation requires an edit operation.

E_TERRAIN_EDIT_SESSION_REQUIRED = -2147205115

-2147205115: The specified operation requires an edit session.

E_TERRAIN_FC_OUTSIDE = -2147205103

-2147205103: The feature class is not in the same feature dataset as the Terrain.

E_TERRAIN_FIELD_NULLABLE = -2147205086

-2147205086: Attribute fields must not be nullable.

E_TERRAIN_FIELD_TYPE_MISMATCH = -2147219394

-2147219394: Output contains a field with the same name as the input but has a different field type.

E_TERRAIN_FILE_CREATE_ERROR = -2147205049

-2147205049: Failed to create file.

E_TERRAIN_FILE_DELETE_ERROR = -2147205048

-2147205048: Failed to delete/overwrite file.

E_TERRAIN_FILE_EXISTS = -2147205113

-2147205113: The specified file or dataset already exists.

E_TERRAIN_FILE_NOT_EXISTS = -2147205112

-2147205112: The specified file or folder does not exist.

E_TERRAIN_FILE_OPEN_ERROR = -2147205111

-2147205111: Failed to open file.

E_TERRAIN_FILE_READ_ERROR = -2147205110

-2147205110: Failed to read file.

E_TERRAIN_FILE_WRITE_ERROR = -2147205052

-2147205052: Failed to write to file.

E_TERRAIN_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147219389

-2147219389: Format not supported.

E_TERRAIN_INCONSIST = -2147205096

-2147205096: One or more properties of the input data source is inconsistent with the rest in the group.

E_TERRAIN_INCONSIST_LOR = -2147205090

-2147205090: The zTolerance/MaxScale pair does not match the others in the definition.

E_TERRAIN_INDEX_OUT_OF_RANGE = -2147205118

-2147205118: The specified index is out of range.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_BOUNDS = -2147205098

-2147205098: Invalid Z tolerance bounds.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_DATA_SOURCE = -2147205120

-2147205120: Unable to add data source (e.g., it's versioned, is not a valid feature class, or its geometry type is not appropriate).

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_DEFINITION = -2147205100

-2147205100: The Terrain definition is incomplete or invalid.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_EMBEDDED_FC_NAME = -2147205069

-2147205069: The embedded feature class name is invalid.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_FILE = -2147205051

-2147205051: Invalid file.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_GEOMETRY_TYPE_FOR_TERRAIN = -2147205082

-2147205082: The feature class has an invalid geometry type.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_TERRAIN = -2147205101

-2147205101: An invalid Terrain does not support the specified operation.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_TERRAIN_NAME = -2147205080

-2147205080: The Terrain name is invalid.

E_TERRAIN_INVALID_Z = -2147205067

-2147205067: Invalid Z value.

E_TERRAIN_IN_EDIT_SESSION = -2147205099

-2147205099: The specified operation is not supported in an edit session.

E_TERRAIN_MIXING_2D_AND_3D = -2147205094

-2147205094: Members must all be either 2D or 3D. Mixing 2D and 3D is not allowed.

E_TERRAIN_MUST_APPLY_TO_OVERVIEW = -2147219391

-2147219391: Point data sources must participate in the overview.

E_TERRAIN_MUST_BE_ZLESS = -2147205114

-2147205114: The operation requires Z-less input.

E_TERRAIN_MUST_NOT_BE_GROUPED = -2147205092

-2147205092: 3D data sources added as mass-point must not be grouped.

E_TERRAIN_NEED_UPDATE = -2147205074

-2147205074: The Terrain needs update before the specified operation can be performed.

E_TERRAIN_NOT_EMBEDDED = -2147205088

-2147205088: The operation can only be applied to an embedded data source.

E_TERRAIN_NOT_INITIALIZED = -2147205117

-2147205117: The terrain object has not been initialized.

E_TERRAIN_NOT_MATCH = -2147205109

-2147205109: The inputs do not match the existing feature class.

E_TERRAIN_NOT_MULTIPOINT = -2147205105

-2147205105: Only multipoint feature classes can be embedded.

E_TERRAIN_NOT_MULTIPOINT_Z = -2147205076

-2147205076: Must be a Z-Aware multipoint feature class.

E_TERRAIN_NOT_PROJECTED_SYSTEM = -2147219400

-2147219400: A projected coordinate system is required.

E_TERRAIN_NO_DATA = -2147205071

-2147205071: Base data sources do not contain any data.

E_TERRAIN_NO_RETURN = -2147205107

-2147205107: Need at least one return number.

E_TERRAIN_NO_SPATIALREF_INFO = -2147205065

-2147205065: Spatial reference information is missing, or insufficient, for the operation.

E_TERRAIN_NULL_FIELD_VALUE = -2147205087

-2147205087: One or more fields contains NULL value.

E_TERRAIN_OLD_VERSION = -2147205073

-2147205073: The specified operation cannot be performed on old version Terrains.

E_TERRAIN_TERRAIN_ALREADY_EXISTS = -2147205083

-2147205083: The terrain with the specified name already exists.

E_TERRAIN_TERRAIN_NOT_FOUND = -2147205085

-2147205085: The terrain was not found.

E_TERRAIN_TERRAIN_NOT_SUPPORTED_IN_RELEASE = -2147205084

-2147205084: Terrains not supported in this release of the GeoDatabase.

E_TERRAIN_TOO_MANY_BASE = -2147205093

-2147205093: Only one member in a group can be applied to the overview.

E_TERRAIN_TOO_MANY_CLIPPING_SOURCES = -2147205068

-2147205068: Only one data source can be used for clipping the overview terrain.

E_TERRAIN_UNKNOWN_BLOB = -2147205075

-2147205075: No blob is specified or the specified blob is unknown.

E_TERRAIN_UNKNOWN_FIELD = -2147205104

-2147205104: One (or more) specified field is unknown to Terrain.

E_TERRAIN_VALUE_OVERFLOW = -2147219398

-2147219398: The input value is too big (or too small) to store.

E_TERRAIN_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147219390

-2147219390: Version not supported.

E_TERRAIN_WINSIZE_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147205059

-2147205059: Window size pyramid not supported in this release of the GeoDatabase.

E_TERRAIN_WKT_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147205050

-2147205050: WKT projection is not supported in this release.

E_TERRAIN_WRONG_DATASET_TYPE = -2147205079

-2147205079: Wrong data set type.

E_TERRAIN_WRONG_FORMAT = -2147205108

-2147205108: One or more specified properties are not supported in this point data format.

E_TERRAIN_WRONG_GEOMETRY_TYPE = -2147205095

-2147205095: The geometry type of the input data source (or feature class) is inadequate.

E_TERRAIN_WRONG_PYRAMID_TYPE = -2147205078

-2147205078: Wrong Terrain pyramid type.

E_TERRAIN_WRONG_SF_TYPE = -2147205091

-2147205091: Incorrect Surface-Feature type.

E_TERRAIN_WRONG_TOPOLOGY = -2147219399

-2147219399: Incorrect boundary tiles topology.

E_TERRAIN_ZTOLERANCE_EXISTS = -2147205102

-2147205102: The input zTolerance already exists.

Made with docfx
